state.next-action: `12-02` is now in motion: Grime Time staff admins are recognized from the mapped Clerk org `org_3BmXmwG7NpGNO1JKpE3MkR667Mm`, the public-shell operator toolbar now exposes `Ops`, `CRM workspace`, `Docs`, `Customer portal`, and a Payload-admin bridge, `/admin/login` redirects signed-in Clerk users into the bridge instead of stranding them on a second login screen, impersonation routes now respect membership-based admin access, homepage media can be replaced or regenerated in place from hover controls on tracked images, the local media drawer is now a two-tab workbench with page-slot actions plus a library/gallery flow for upload, drag-drop, generate, and swap operations, page and library generate prompts now open inline on the clicked card instead of dropping into a detached detail block, local media tooling now accepts video uploads and can deliberately generate image or video media records from the same workbench, page-slot generation now always forks a new media record and swaps the page reference so shared media ids are not mutated in place, image-to-video iteration can now reuse the current image record as the source reference for video generation, page-slot cards in the drawer now collapse into a single focused modal with `Image`, `Video`, and `Gallery` tabs so admins can upload, drag-drop, generate, or swap media without the old inline action clutter, the org bootstrap membership path now runs under a stable local Payload request so staff routes no longer fail on `organization_id` / `user_id` relationship validation, the portal shell has been tightened so `/ops` uses a slimmer standard sidebar, direct `Public site` access, normal page scrolling, and no duplicate workspace CTA in the header, the Business momentum chart now uses a bottom KPI summary row instead of stray header buttons so live details like `active plans` and `open quotes` stay visible, and the compact KPI cards plus chart disclaimer have been normalized so `/ops` no longer pins trend pills in the top-right or tells staff that real data is coming in a later phase. Next slice is the rest of `12-02`: build durable admin/workspace controls to assign memberships, promote or demote role templates, and lock or unlock entitlements from Grime Time itself, while `11-05` still retains the remaining Supabase-retirement and Stripe-customer-id linkage cleanup.
